ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "provnum" INTEGER /* Provider number associated with the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient (e.g., Caucas, Other) */,
  "dthstrk" TEXT /* Indicator for whether the patient has had a stroke (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "smoker" TEXT /* Indicator for whether the patient is a smoker (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "ccscore" INTEGER /* Chronic disease score for the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient (in kilograms) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "health_insurance" TEXT /* Type of health insurance the patient has (e.g., Medicare, Medicaid, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_provnum FOREIGN KEY ("provnum") REFERENCES providers ("provnum")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provnum" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "prov_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the provider (e.g., city, state) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the provider */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for the provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the provider (e.g., Cardiology, Oncology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provnum")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "provnum" INTEGER /* Provider number associated with the hospital */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "volhosp" TEXT /* Volume of patients treated at the hospital (e.g., 50+) */,
  "volsurg" TEXT /* Volume of surgeries performed at the hospital (e.g., 30+) */,
  "volavglos" REAL /* Average length of stay (in days) for patients at the hospital */,
  "voldischarged" INTEGER /* Total number of patients discharged from the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_volumes_provnum FOREIGN KEY ("provnum") REFERENCES providers ("provnum")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "patid" TEXT /* Patient identifier */,
  "totchg" INTEGER /* Total cost of treatment for the patient */,
  "drug_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of medication for the patient */,
  "surgery_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of surgery for the patient */,
  "hospital_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of hospital stay for the patient */,
  "other_cost" INTEGER /* Other costs associated with the patient's treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_costs_patid FOREIGN KEY ("patid") REFERENCES patients ("patid")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator record */,
  "patid" TEXT /* Patient identifier */,
  "dthstrk" TEXT /* Indicator for whether the patient has had a stroke (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "smoker" TEXT /* Indicator for whether the patient is a smoker (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "ccscore" INTEGER /* Chronic disease score for the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure of the patient (in mmHg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_patid FOREIGN KEY ("patid") REFERENCES patients ("patid")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "patid" TEXT /* Patient identifier */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient (e.g., Caucas, Other) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the patient (e.g., High School, College) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the patient (e.g., Low, Middle, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_patid FOREIGN KEY ("patid") REFERENCES patients ("patid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Cardiology, Oncology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patid" TEXT /* Patient identifier */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment provided */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was provided */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Provider identifier for the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_patid FOREIGN KEY ("patid") REFERENCES patients ("patid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_treatments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provnum")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patid" TEXT /* Patient identifier */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patid FOREIGN KEY ("patid") REFERENCES patients ("patid")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "patid" TEXT /* Patient identifier */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Hospital identifier for the admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES providers ("provnum"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_patid FOREIGN KEY ("patid") REFERENCES patients ("patid")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab record */,
  "patid" TEXT /* Patient identifier */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "lab_result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "lab_date" TEXT /* Date the lab test was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labs_patid FOREIGN KEY ("patid") REFERENCES patients ("patid")
)
